commands.forgetme.save_failed: Failed to save your opt-out. No data was deleted — please try again later.
commands.forgetme.delete_failed: You are now opted out of future tracking, but deleting your stored data failed. Please run `/forgetme` again to retry the deletion.
commands.forgetme.success:
Your data has been deleted and tracking is now disabled for your account in all servers using this bot.

**Removed:** {members} member record(s), {roles} role change(s), {activity} activity record(s).

Use `/optin` if you ever want to re-enable tracking.
commands.forgetme.cancelled_desc: No data was deleted and tracking remains unchanged.
commands.forgetme.confirm_desc:
This will **delete your tracked data in all servers** using this bot (last seen, join info, nicknames, role history, and message activity counts) and **stop all future tracking** of your account.

**This cannot be undone.** You can re-enable tracking later with `/optin`, but deleted data is not restored.
commands.optin.not_opted_out: You are not opted out — your activity is already being tracked.
commands.optin.update_failed: Failed to update your tracking preference. Please try again later.
commands.optin.success: Tracking re-enabled. Your stats start fresh from now — previously deleted data is not restored.
commands.mystats.not_tracked: You aren't currently tracked on this server.
commands.mystats.title: 📊 Your Stats - {username}
commands.mystats.footer: Only you can see this message
commands.about.title: 📊 LastSeen
commands.about.description:
**LastSeen** is a Discord bot for monitoring and tracking user activity across guilds.

It tracks:
• User joins and leaves
• Nickname changes
• Role updates
• Presence and activity status

Designed for server moderators who want clear insight into member activity without unnecessary noise.
commands.about.privacy_value:
This bot does **not** store or read message content. Only metadata required for activity tracking is recorded.
Use `/forgetme` to delete your data and opt out of tracking.
[Privacy Policy](https://lastseen.bot.nu/privacy-policy/)

admin.config.title: Bot Configuration
admin.config.description:
Configure bot settings for this server.

**🚀 First time here?** Click **Quick Setup** for a guided walkthrough!

**📢 Set Notification Channel:** Choose where member leave notifications are posted
**📅 Set Inactive Days:** Set the threshold for /inactive command
**🌍 Set Timezone:** Configure server timezone (e.g., America/New_York)
**🌐 Set Language:** Choose the language for bot messages
**👑 Set Bot Admin Role:** Set which role can manage bot settings
**🔐 Toggle User Role Required:** Enable/disable role requirement for using bot commands
**👤 Set User Role:** Set which role can use bot commands (when required)
**🎯 Set Track Only Roles:** Only track members with specific roles (optional)
**📝 Set Allowed Channels:** Restrict bot commands to specific channels (optional)
**📊 Configure Reports:** Set up automated weekly/monthly activity reports
**🚫 Disable Reports:** Turn off scheduled reports for this server
**🚀 Quick Setup:** Guided wizard for first-time setup
**⚙️ View Config:** View current configuration settings
admin.help.title: LastSeen Bot - Help
admin.help.description:
Track member activity, monitor server statistics, and automate reports. Use `/config` to configure bot settings.

**Quick Start:**
• Check when someone was last online: `/lastseen @user`
• View member details: `/whois @user`
• List inactive members: `/inactive`
• Configure bot settings: `/config` (Admin only)
admin.help.user_commands:
`/whois <user>` - Show user info, roles, join date, last seen
`/lastseen <user>` or `/seen <user>` - When user was last online
`/inactive` - List members offline beyond threshold
`/inactive <days>` - List members offline for <days> days
`/chat-history <user>` - Show message posting stats for the last year
`/mystats` - View your own activity statistics (only visible to you)
`/user-stats` - Interactive statistics dashboard with analytics
`/forgetme` - Delete your data and opt out of tracking
`/optin` - Re-enable tracking after opting out
admin.help.admin_commands:
`/config` - Configure bot settings:
  • Notification channel & inactive days
  • Admin/user role permissions
  • Track only specific roles (optional)
  • Allowed channels (restrict commands)
`/role-history <user>` - View role change history for a member
admin.help.search:
`/search` - Advanced member search with filters
  Examples:
  • `/search roles:@Moderator status:online`
  • `/search inactive:>30 activity:<10`
  • `/search joined:>2025-01-01 export:csv`
  Filters: roles, status, inactive, activity, joined, username
  Export: csv or txt format
admin.help.footer_admin: Bot Admin Role: {role} • Showing all commands
admin.help.footer_user: User role: {role} • Showing user commands only

admin.quick_setup.step1_desc:
**📢 Notification Channel**

Choose where the bot will post notifications when members leave your server.

**Why this matters:**
• Get alerts when members depart
• Track who left and when
• Keep admins informed of changes

**Recommendation:** Use a private admin channel or mod logs channel.

**Current setting:** {channel}
admin.quick_setup.step1_footer: Click 'Configure' to set this up, or 'Next' to skip for now
admin.quick_setup.step2_desc:
**📅 Inactive Days Threshold**

Set how many days a member must be offline before appearing in `/inactive` command.

**Why this matters:**
• Identify members who may have lost interest
• Plan engagement campaigns
• Clean up inactive roles

**Common values:**
• Small communities: 7-14 days
• Medium servers: 30 days
• Large servers: 60-90 days

**Current setting:** {days} days
admin.quick_setup.step3_desc:
**👑 Bot Admin Role**

Choose which role can manage bot settings and access admin commands.

**Why this matters:**
• Controls who can configure the bot
• Restricts access to sensitive commands
• Doesn't require Discord Administrator permission

**Recommendation:** Use your existing 'Moderator' or 'Admin' role.

**Current setting:** {role}
admin.quick_setup.step3_footer: Click 'Configure' to set this up, or 'Skip' to use default
admin.quick_setup.step4_desc:
**🌍 Server Timezone (Optional)**

Set your server's timezone for accurate timestamp display in all commands.

**Why this matters:**
• Shows times in your local timezone
• Makes activity reports more meaningful
• Improves readability for your community

**Examples:**
• US East Coast: `America/New_York`
• UK: `Europe/London`
• Japan: `Asia/Tokyo`
• Australia: `Australia/Sydney`

**Current setting:** {timezone}
admin.quick_setup.step4_footer: Optional: Configure timezone or Skip to use UTC
admin.quick_setup.step5_no_config: ⚠️ Configuration not found. Please try setup again.
admin.quick_setup.step5_footer: Click 'Finish Setup' to close this wizard
admin.quick_setup.finished:
Setup wizard completed! Your bot is ready to use.

Use `/config` anytime to adjust settings or explore advanced features.
admin.quick_setup.cancelled_desc: Quick setup was cancelled. You can use `/config` anytime to configure the bot.
